observed_issue: The right side of the legend is outside the raster canvas; the third label is visibly truncated after 'Validation c'.
fix: increase right canvas margin or output width
move the unchanged legend fully inside the canvas
reopen the revised image at final size
claim_limit: Pixels establish clipping only; they do not establish whether any category was omitted from data.

observed_issue: The heatmap visibly uses a blue-to-red continuous gradient but has no colorbar, ticks, limits, direction, or units; the injection code confirms a continuous mapping with vmin=-2 and vmax=2 whose guide was suppressed.
fix: restore a colorbar for the existing mapping
show unchanged limits, direction, ticks, title and units
do not infer scale semantics from colour alone
claim_limit: The image alone cannot recover numerical limits or units; those come from code and metadata.

observed_issue: GENE_A through GENE_E visibly collide around the same dense point cluster and obscure both neighbouring labels and mark-to-label assignment.
fix: repel labels or adjust positions with leader lines
increase local panel space
preserve the declared labelled set and point coordinates
claim_limit: Pixels identify overlap but not whether the chosen genes are scientifically appropriate.

observed_issue: Panel titles, tick labels, axis titles and the figure title are materially smaller than the primary marks at the injected final-size geometry; the two y-axis titles also crowd the central gutter.
fix: increase required typography
widen the inter-panel gutter
remove only nonessential decorative text
reopen at the declared physical size
claim_limit: Pixels establish readability failure only; they do not justify changing numeric precision or units.

observed_issue: Responder is blue in Cohort 1 but orange in Cohort 2, while Non-responder is orange then blue; code confirms identical category names with swapped manual mappings. The shared title also overlaps both panel titles as a secondary layout defect.
fix: apply one named category-to-colour mapping to both panels
retain separate guides only if meanings differ
increase title spacing without changing category identities
claim_limit: Cross-panel identity equivalence is confirmed by code; pixels alone would not prove the labels refer to the same semantic categories.

observed_issue: Two equal bars have no direct category labels, shape, pattern or outline distinction; matching Group A and Group B to marks depends exclusively on red versus green legend keys.
fix: replace the palette with a colour-vision-deficiency-safe pair
add direct labels, pattern, outline or another redundant channel
verify grayscale separability while preserving group identities
claim_limit: The image establishes a colour-only accessibility failure, not the prevalence or effect of any real group.

observed_issue: The title declares a neutral reference of 2, but all supplied values from 0.5 to 4 are rendered against a diverging scale centred at 0; values below the declared neutral therefore appear on the positive/red side. The colorbar label is additionally clipped on the right.
fix: confirm whether the intended estimand is raw value, deviation from 2, or another transform
after confirmation, centre the scale at the scientifically declared neutral or use a sequential scale
repair colorbar-label clipping and document final scale semantics
claim_limit: The midpoint defect is established only because image, code and fixture values are all available; it must not be inferred from pixels alone.
